title: Harness Engineering Is AI’s New Gold Rush
summary: Harness engineering is an emerging approach that focuses on building reliable systems around AI models rather than just optimizing prompts. It encompasses tools, memory, context, permissions, verification, recovery paths, and feedback loops to make AI agents function reliably over time. This represents a shift from prompt engineering as the primary competitive advantage in AI deployment.
